description_long: This is a tall, rectangular filing cabinet constructed from light-colored wood, featuring a minimalist design. The front face displays two large doors with small, round black finger holes for opening, and two drawers at the bottom, each with similar round finger holes. The sides and back are plain, with no visible hardware or ornamentation, emphasizing a clean and functional aesthetic. The cabinet stands on a slightly recessed base, giving it a subtle floating appearance. The wood grain is visible throughout, adding a natural texture to the otherwise simple form. This cabinet is suitable for storing documents or office supplies and would fit well in modern or utilitarian urban environments.
description: A tall, light wood filing cabinet with two large doors and two lower drawers, featuring minimalist round finger holes. The design is clean and functional, with visible wood grain and a recessed base.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large doors with round finger holes and two drawers below, also with round finger holes.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, unadorned wooden surface with visible wood grain.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely flat, featureless wooden panel.
description_view_3: Right side view, identical to the left, with a plain wooden surface and visible grain.
